local_updates: Norman: Jazz in June runs June 18–20 and should create parking pressure and evening movement.
OKC Zoo Amphitheatre has major opening-week shows with Ella Langley and Lupe Fiasco.
Jones Assembly opens at noon Friday for the USA vs Australia match at 2 PM.
Royal Bavaria has Father's Day dinner June 21 plus Route 66 Friday and Canyon Echo Saturday in the Biergarten.
Libby's Cafe continues daily specials with Friday and Saturday specials starting at 5 PM.
Mooney's remains a standing weekly relationship venue while open.
weather_watch: Mid-June — Warm evenings with possible scattered storms may increase ride preference for outdoor events, patios, and festivals
